message:
Add startup config/LazyValue.Reset and resilience manifest tests

startup: SetConfigPath, GetConfig, MustGetConfig, IsConfigLoaded,
ResetConfig (all 0%→100%), LazyValue.Reset (0%→100%). 83.7%→89.5%.

resilience: ManifestDir, LogDir, SaveManifest, LoadManifest,
DeleteManifest (all 0%→75-100%) with XDG_DATA_HOME env override
and round-trip tests. 75.7%→80.0%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
